parameters.jsCode:
// Cap at 2 videos per run to avoid overwhelming the generation service
return $input.all().slice(0, 2);

meta.notes:
Sub-workflow 1e: receives all built-prompt items from orchestrator, filters to media_type=video, caps at 2 per run, submits prompt to a Dify workflow app (blocking), parses the video URL from outputs, inserts post.

Setup:
1. Create a Dify Workflow app with one input variable named 'prompt' and one output variable named 'video_url' (or 'url' / 'result' — the parse node tries all three).
2. Configure your preferred video-generation model (e.g. Kling, Wan, etc.) inside that Dify app.
3. Add DIFY_VIDEO_API_KEY as an n8n variable (the API key for this specific Dify app, NOT the teaching-workflow key).
4. DIFY_API_URL should be https://api.dify.ai/v1 (already set).
5. SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY must also be set as n8n variables.
